_comment: KQL Real-Time Dashboard — Store Operations Live
Import this definition into a Fabric Real-Time Dashboard.
Each tile contains a standalone KQL query designed for the
RealtimeSales table in the tt_eventhouse / tt_kqldb.
name: Store Operations Live

tiles.title: Transactions Per Minute
tiles.kql_query:
let lookback = 60m;
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| summarize
    TransactionCount = count(),
    Revenue = round(sum(TotalAmount), 2)
    by StoreRegion = substring(StoreId, 0, 4), bin(Timestamp, 1m)
| order by Timestamp asc, StoreRegion asc

tiles.title: Revenue Rolling 24h
tiles.kql_query:
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize
    TotalRevenue = round(sum(TotalAmount), 2),
    TransactionCount = count()
| extend AvgOrderValue = round(TotalRevenue / TransactionCount, 2)
;
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize HourlyRevenue = round(sum(TotalAmount), 2) by bin(Timestamp, 1h)
| order by Timestamp asc

visualization.sparkline_query:
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize HourlyRevenue = round(sum(TotalAmount), 2) by bin(Timestamp, 1h)
| order by Timestamp asc
visualization.subtitle: 24h rolling revenue

tiles.title: Top 10 Products Now
tiles.kql_query:
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize
    TotalRevenue = round(sum(TotalAmount), 2),
    TotalQuantity = sum(Quantity),
    TransactionCount = count()
    by ProductId, ProductName, Category
| top 10 by TotalRevenue desc
| project ProductName, Category, TotalRevenue, TotalQuantity, TransactionCount

tiles.title: Store Heatmap
tiles.kql_query:
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize
    TransactionCount = count(),
    Revenue = round(sum(TotalAmount), 2)
    by StoreId, StoreName
| extend TransactionIntensity = case(
    TransactionCount > 50, "high",
    TransactionCount > 20, "medium",
    "low"
  )
| project StoreId, StoreName, TransactionCount, Revenue, TransactionIntensity
| order by TransactionCount desc

visualization.notes: Map visualization requires store latitude/longitude in a lookup table. Fall back to a treemap if geo-coordinates are unavailable.

tiles.title: Payment Method Distribution
tiles.kql_query:
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(4h)
| summarize
    Revenue = round(sum(TotalAmount), 2),
    TransactionCount = count()
    by PaymentMethod
| extend RevenueShare = round(100.0 * Revenue / toscalar(
    RealtimeSales
    | where Timestamp > ago(4h)
    | summarize sum(TotalAmount)
  ), 1)
| order by Revenue desc

tiles.title: Anomaly Alerts
tiles.kql_query:
let lookback = 7d;
let bin_size = 1h;
let anomaly_threshold = 1.5;
let recent_window = 24h;
RealtimeSales
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| summarize SalesCount = count() by StoreId, bin(Timestamp, bin_size)
| make-series
    SalesCountSeries = sum(SalesCount) default=0
    on Timestamp
    from ago(lookback) to now()
    step bin_size
    by StoreId
| extend (AnomalyFlags, AnomalyScore, ExpectedSales) =
    series_decompose_anomalies(SalesCountSeries, anomaly_threshold)
| mv-expand
    Timestamp to typeof(datetime),
    SalesCountSeries to typeof(long),
    AnomalyFlags to typeof(int),
    AnomalyScore to typeof(real),
    ExpectedSales to typeof(real)
| where AnomalyFlags != 0 and Timestamp > ago(recent_window)
| extend AnomalyType = iff(AnomalyFlags == 1, "spike", "dip")
| project
    StoreId,
    Timestamp,
    SalesCount = SalesCountSeries,
    ExpectedSales = round(ExpectedSales, 1),
    AnomalyScore = round(AnomalyScore, 2),
    AnomalyType
| order by abs(AnomalyScore) desc
